options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to use [7000]. Default is 7000

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show more console output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to use [5050]. Use 0 for a dynamic port.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Show less console output.

options.name: --signalr-type
options.description: SignalR type: 0 or 1. 0 for local selfhost SignalR, 1 for Azure SignalR Service, default it is 0.

options.name: --server-connection
options.description: Set the server connection count to ASRS, default is 5.

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: Specify the ASRS connection string.

options.name: --access-token-lifetime
options.description: Specify access token's life time in hour, default is 24 hours.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show more console output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --agentlist
options.description: Specify the agents endpoint list with ',' as separator. for example, '10.172.1.5:7000,10.172.1.6:7000', Default is 'localhost:7000'

options.name: --configuration
options.description: Specify the configuration YAML filename. If it is '?', it will print help for all options of the configuration.

options.name: --webapp
options.description: Specify the SignalR web app hub URL. This option is ignored if '--configuration' is specified. Default value is 'http://localhost:5050/signalrbench'

options.name: --connections
options.description: Specify the client connection counts. This option is ignored if '--configuration' is specified. Default value is 1000.

options.name: --basesending
options.description: Specify the base sending counts. This option is ignored if '--configuration' is specified. Default value is 500.

options.name: --step
options.description: Specify the sending number for every step. Typically, the sending message count is gradually increasing to avoid CPU spike. This option is ignored if '--configuration' is specified. Default value is 500.

options.name: --duration
options.description: The duration (milliseconds) of running for a single step. This option is ignored if '--configuration' is specified. Default value is 240000.

options.name: --scenario
options.description: Specify the scenario: echo|broadcast. If you want to try more scenarios, please use --configuration. This option is ignored if '--configuration' is specified. Default value is echo.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug for printing more details. This option is ignored if '--configuration' is specified. Default value is true.

options.name: --use-builtin-agent
options.description: Launch builtin agent for a quick start if you specify 1. It is not recommended for an official perf test. Default is 0.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information
